scripts.test:fast: npm --workspace YPmcn test && npm --workspace vector-mcp run build && uv run --no-project python -B tests/test_hooks.py && node scripts/smoke-vector-mcp.mjs
scripts.test:mcp: npm --workspace vector-mcp run build && node scripts/smoke-vector-mcp.mjs
scripts.test:openclaw: npm --workspace YPmcn run build && node scripts/check-openclaw-source.mjs
scripts.test:headless: npm run test:fast && npm run test:openclaw
